text.title: Agent Integration for Design Assistant Patterns
text.summary: Review-mode agent workflow, context scoping rules, service catalog, and gotchas for agent-driven design review.

rule.statement: Scope design context to under 50k tokens before sending to the model — strip hidden layers, locked frames, and non-visible nodes.
rule.rationale: Design context from Figma can be arbitrarily large. Uncontrolled context causes high cost and degraded quality. Scoping to relevant visible nodes preserves useful signal.

rule.statement: Inject project-specific rules (spacing scale, brand palette, component naming) as system prompt context for review assistants.
rule.rationale: Review assistants trained on generic design principles miss project-specific standards. Without explicit injection, the assistant flags violations against generic rules, not the project's actual requirements.

rule.statement: Strip markdown code fences from Claude JSON responses before parsing.
rule.rationale: Structured JSON output from Claude occasionally wraps in markdown code fences (```json). JSON parsers reject this format; always strip fences before parsing.

list.item: Claude API (Anthropic SaaS) — primary engine for contextual, review, and doc-gen assistant patterns
Figma REST API (SaaS) — source of design context (nodes, styles, components)
Figma UXP Plugin SDK (OSS) — build sidebar/inline assistants inside Figma; sandboxed JS environment
Storybook (OSS) — component docs parseable and feedable to a review assistant
Linear (SaaS REST) — log assistant-generated feedback as issues for designer follow-up
jsonschema (Python) — validate structured assistant output before acting on it

antipattern.description: Inline assistant that batch-applies node property changes without undo hooks.
antipattern.reason: Agents that batch-apply Figma changes without going through the undo stack can corrupt files. All AI design actions must be reversible via Figma's undo mechanism.

antipattern.description: UXP plugin making direct HTTP calls to Claude API.
antipattern.reason: UXP plugin sandbox does not allow external HTTP requests by default. Calls to Claude must proxy through a backend service.

text.reference: Component review prompt against accessibility, tokens, states, responsiveness
Inline suggestion prompt for a selected Figma layer
Design review pipeline: spec file → structured JSON feedback
